concepts.name: What happens to the group discount if one person in a group of 6 cancels?
concepts.description: This is the original user question that initiated the trace, asking about the impact of a cancellation on a group discount for a group of six people.

concepts.name: moderator
concepts.description: The moderator agent coordinates the activities of specialized agents to address user queries effectively. It decides which agent to consult based on the nature of the query.

concepts.name: concierge_agent
concepts.description: The concierge agent specializes in looking up train prices and fares by accessing specific documentation and tools. It is consulted for pricing-related queries.

concepts.name: schedule_agent
concepts.description: The schedule agent is responsible for finding train and airplane timetables and attractions in cities. It accesses documentation specific to schedules and attractions.

concepts.name: itinerary_agent
concepts.description: The itinerary agent extracts feasible routes and average travel times using graph database queries. It is consulted for route planning and travel time calculations.

concepts.name: noa-trip-planner-mas
concepts.description: This service acts as the overarching system managing the multi-agent setup for trip planning and user query resolution.

concepts.name: azure/gpt-4o
concepts.description: The large language model used by the agents to process prompts and generate responses. It is identified as Azure GPT-4o.

concepts.name: list_documents
concepts.description: A function used by agents to list all documents available in their data directory. It helps in identifying relevant files for further processing.

concepts.name: read_document
concepts.description: A function that reads the content of a specified document file. It is used by agents to extract information from their data sources.

concepts.name: calculate
concepts.description: A function that performs mathematical calculations on given expressions. It supports basic arithmetic and common mathematical functions.

concepts.name: query_graph_database
concepts.description: A function used by the itinerary agent to query a graph database for all possible paths between cities and their travel times. It aids in route planning.

concepts.name: group discount
concepts.description: A domain concept referring to a pricing policy where discounts are applied to groups of travelers. The query seeks to understand its behavior under specific conditions.

concepts.name: cancellation policy
concepts.description: A domain concept related to the rules and conditions governing cancellations in travel bookings, particularly their impact on pricing or discounts.

concepts.name: train schedules
concepts.description: A domain concept involving the timetables and departure times for trains, as provided by the schedule agent.

concepts.name: travel itineraries
concepts.description: A domain concept referring to planned travel routes and schedules, including attractions and activities at destinations.

concepts.name: pricing information
concepts.description: A domain concept concerning the cost details of travel options, including fares and discounts, as handled by the concierge agent.

concepts.name: attractions
concepts.description: A domain concept referring to points of interest or activities in cities, as identified by the schedule agent.

concepts.name: output
concepts.description: The final answer provided by the system, summarizing that none of the agents have information about group discounts or cancellation impacts, and recommending consulting the booking platform or customer service.

attributes.source_name: What happens to the group discount if one person in a group of 6 cancels?
attributes.summarized_context: The user query is directed to the moderator agent for coordination.
The moderator delegates the task of finding pricing information to the concierge agent.
The moderator delegates the task of checking for policy details to the schedule agent.
The moderator delegates the task of confirming route-related information to the itinerary agent.
The concierge agent uses the list_documents function to identify relevant files.
The concierge agent uses the read_document function to extract information from files.
The schedule agent uses the list_documents function to identify relevant files.
The schedule agent uses the read_document function to extract information from files.
The itinerary agent uses the query_graph_database function to retrieve route information.
The itinerary agent uses the calculate function to perform mathematical operations.
The NOA Trip Planner MAS hosts the moderator agent.
The NOA Trip Planner MAS hosts the concierge agent.
The NOA Trip Planner MAS hosts the schedule agent.
The NOA Trip Planner MAS hosts the itinerary agent.
The NOA Trip Planner MAS utilizes the Azure GPT-4o model for processing.
The group discount concept is related to the cancellation policy in the context of the user query.
Train schedules contribute to the construction of travel itineraries.
Pricing information includes details about group discounts.

attributes.target_name: What happens to the group discount if one person in a group of 6 cancels?
attributes.summarized_context: The output provides the final answer to the user's query.
